title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Agnes
Digital...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What in the?! T-T-T-Trainer! The plushies in that machine! They're...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're Cuties! They're always snapped up by fans
before the stores even finish putting them on the
shelves! But look! There are so many... So! Many!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Agnes Digital says, there's a claw machine with
a bounty of plushies inside.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, my sweets! We'll have you out of
there in no time! ♪ Hahaha, nyafufufu!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
M-my... My whole body is shaking... Is it 'cause
I'm... nervous?! I can't....

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I have to! Are you just gonna stand here,
Digitan?! Ngh... Come on, body! Move!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
